name: AURSAD (interpolated)
description: Automated UR3e Screwdriving Anomaly Dataset, interpolated to uniform timestep. Collected on a UR3e cobot performing automated screwdriving tasks with injected faults.

name: voraus-AD (interpolated)
description: Voraus Anomaly Detection dataset, interpolated to uniform timestep. Collected on a UR5 cobot performing pick-and-place tasks with injected faults.

name: FactoryWave
description: Real-robot recordings from a UR3 cobot covering pick-and-place, peg-in-hole, and screwing tasks, with normal, fault, counterfactual, and trajectory-optimization conditions.
